solution_summary: This implementation plan outlines changes needed to add a booking cancellation feature to the system, verify booking status, handle cancellations, and provide clear refund outcomes. It includes necessary code modifications, unit tests, error handling improvements, and documentation updates.
implementation_steps: Implement API endpoint for booking cancellation in `backend/app/api/routes/bookings.py`.
Develop business logic for booking verification and cancellation in `backend/app/services/booking_service.py`.
Add error handling for common cancellation scenarios, including booking not found and refund issues.
Draft clear messaging for users regarding the refund process to be returned by the API after cancellation.
Create unit tests to cover the fallback scenarios and edge cases for the cancellation feature.

planned_changes.change_summary: Add endpoint for cancelling bookings and ensuring refund eligibility is verified.
planned_changes.rationale: This change enables frontend interaction with the cancellation workflow.

planned_changes.change_summary: Implement logic for verifying booking status and processing cancellations.
planned_changes.rationale: This is needed to ensure that cancellations adhere to business rules and enable corrective actions.

planned_changes.change_summary: Document the refund process clearly for customer understanding.
planned_changes.rationale: Users need clear guidance on what to expect when they cancel their booking.

patch_strategy: Create a new feature branch `feature/SDLC-2-customer-should-be-able-to-cancel-booking-for-refund`, implement changes, test locally, and then create a pull request for review.
validation_steps: Run existing tests to ensure no breaking changes have been introduced.
Execute new unit tests for the cancellation logic to validate functionality and edge cases.
Review documentation to ensure the refund process is clearly articulated and accurate before deployment.
pr_title: Implement Booking Cancellation Feature for Refund
pr_body: This PR implements a new feature allowing customers to cancel their bookings for refunds. The cancellation workflow includes verifying booking statuses and providing clear information regarding refund processes.
